name: Snowbird Season Re-Engagement
description: Annual October 1 trigger for Seasonal Residents segment. Dispatches pre-arrival inspection offer and 30/60/90 day touchpoint sequence via Constant Contact with Nemotron-personalized content.

config.condition: Run on October 1 each year and trigger 30/60/90 day follow-ups

config.description: Check if today is a snowbird trigger date
config.code: const today = new Date(); const month = today.getMonth() + 1; const day = today.getDate(); const triggerDates = { '10-1': 'initial', '11-1': '30day', '12-1': '60day', '1-1': '90day' }; const key = month + '-' + day; const phase = triggerDates[key]; output = { is_trigger_day: !!phase, phase: phase || 'none', date: today.toISOString().split('T')[0] };

payload.prompt: Generate a {{step1.phase}} snowbird re-engagement email for {{lead.name}} in {{lead.zone}}. Property value: {{lead.property_value}}. Phase context: initial = pre-arrival inspection offer with complimentary first inspection, 30day = service confirmation and storm season recap, 60day = property status update and service upsell to weekly ($395/month), 90day = season wrap-up and year-round monitoring pitch. Personalize to property and zone. Close with risk of unmonitored property.

config.message: SNOWBIRD {{step1.phase}} TRIGGER | {{step3.total}} seasonal leads contacted | Phase: {{step1.phase}} | Date: {{step1.date}}
